prompt: I set up A2UI and my surface isn't rendering. I'm sending surfaceUpdate messages with my components but the client shows a blank screen. What could be wrong? Walk me through the most common causes.

assertions.name: identifies-missing-beginRendering-as-primary-cause
assertions.description: Identifies missing beginRendering as the first/primary cause of blank screen

assertions.name: explains-ordering-requirement
assertions.description: Explains that beginRendering must come after surfaceUpdate (ordering matters)

assertions.name: mentions-root-id-mismatch
assertions.description: Mentions that the root field in beginRendering must match a component id in the surfaceUpdate

assertions.name: shows-correct-example
assertions.description: Shows a correct JSON example with surfaceUpdate followed by beginRendering
